# makeAssignedWorkDocument()

**Instance Method**

Create a new instance of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument].

## Declaration

```swift
func makeAssignedWorkDocument() throws -> AssignedWorkDocument
```

## Return Value
